holdings.infoBox: QWLD is an equity ETF with a total of 1277 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 2.39%, Apple at 2.35%, NVIDIA at 2.27%, Broadcom at 1.82%, and Meta Platforms at 1.81%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR MSCI World StrategicFactors ETF (QWLD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI World Factor Mix A-Series index. The fund tracks an index of developed-market securities that consists of 3 subindexes based on value, minimum volatility and quality. QWLD was launched on Jun 4, 2014 and is issued by State Street.
